articles.title: PSSSB Jail Warder Admit card 2026 released at sssb.punjab.gov.in; candidates can download hall ticket through email and website
articles.summary: The Punjab Subordinate Service Selection Board has released the PSSSB Jail Warder Admit Card 2026 for the written examination scheduled on July 26, 2026. Candidates applying for Jail Warder and Matron posts can download the hall ticket through the official website or registered email IDs.

articles.summary: Sanjay Sharma is a seasoned journalist with over two decades of experience in the media industry. Currently serving as Assistant Editor - Education at TimesofIndia.com, he specializes in education-related content, including board results, job notifications, and studying abroad.

articles.title: TN Supplementary result 2026 declared for private candidates at dge.tn.gov.in: Direct link to download scorecards
articles.summary: The Directorate of Government Examinations (DGE), Tamil Nadu, has announced the TN Supplementary Result 2026 for private candidates of Classes 10, 11 and 12 arrear examinations. Students can download their provisional marksheets from the official portal using their roll number and date of birth.

articles.title: Delhi University Political Science department turns 75, honours former faculty and launches academic journal
articles.summary: The University of Delhi's Department of Political Science marked its Diamond Jubilee with a programme featuring the launch of a new academic journal, addresses by university leaders and invited speakers, and a felicitation ceremony for former faculty members and alumni. Speakers reflected on the department's academic journey, higher education and knowledge systems.
